series_metadata.series_description: Information regarding the identification and program of inmates who receive special educational services. This includes Individualized Education Plan, and Multi-Factored Evaluation documentation as required by federal law.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Any/all Special Education records to be maintained permanently. ; Paper: Retain at institution where inmate is/was housed at least until the end of incarceration. To be maintained on-site until transferred to off-site storage facility. Records to be maintained permanently in paper or electronic format. Paper records mayl be shredded if converted to electronic format., Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Permanent
